misc: Famous for being an ambassador for the AimPoint method for putting.
biography: Timo, representing Keimola Golf, stands as a seasoned competitor within the prestigious Hector Trophée, poised to make his ninth appearance in this revered pair competition at the upcoming Hector Trophée 2026. His journey through eight previous editions showcases an enduring dedication to the event, solidifying his stature as a key figure over many years.

Over his eight prior participations, Timo has distinguished himself as a formidable force in the pair format, guiding his teams to claim the coveted Hector Trophée on three separate occasions. This impressive tally of team victories speaks volumes about his strategic acumen and his ability to elevate his partners' game. While individual glory, in the form of the Victor Trophy, has yet to materialize, his contribution to his pairs' triumphs remains an undeniable hallmark of his competitive journey.

An esteemed proponent of the AimPoint method, Timo’s putting technique is characterized by an exacting mathematical precision. This intellectual rigor on the greens is not merely a competitive advantage but also reflects a broader philosophy of meticulous strategy and foresight that he applies to every facet of his game, undoubtedly contributing to his consistent team successes.
